title: Collider
description: Geometry attached to a PhysicsBody: a Shape plus a body-local offset/rotation, material (friction/restitution/density) and a collision filter. A body may own several colliders (compound). The collider also caches its world-space geometry — refreshed by synchronize — which the broad phase, narrow phase and queries read directly. Material fields and the filter are mutable; the shape and local placement are immutable (rebuild the collider to change geometry).

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Geometry attached to a PhysicsBody: a Shape plus a body-local offset/rotation, material (friction/restitution/density) and a collision filter. A body may own several colliders (compound). The collider also caches its world-space geometry — refreshed by synchronize — which the broad phase, narrow phase and queries read directly.
Material fields and the filter are mutable; the shape and local placement are immutable (rebuild the collider to change geometry).

members.name: _markDestroyed
members.description: Internal: mark destroyed (called by the world).

members.name: synchronize
members.description: Recompute the cached world geometry from the body's transform. Called by the body on setTransform, on collider creation, and by the world before each detection pass.

members.name: shape
members.description: Stable id, assigned when the owning body joins a world (-1 until then).

members.name: aabb
members.description: The collider's world AABB (valid after the latest synchronize).

members.name: body
members.description: The body this collider belongs to. null until the collider has been added to a body that has joined a world (free-standing colliders have no body yet).

members.name: destroyed
members.description: true after the owning world has destroyed this collider.

members.name: id
members.description: Stable id, assigned when the owning body joins a world via world.add(); -1 until then.

members.name: localTransform
members.description: The collider's body-local transform (offset + local rotation).

members.name: worldCenter
members.description: World-space circle centre (only meaningful for circle shapes).

members.name: worldNormals
members.description: World-space polygon outward normals [x0, y0, …] (only meaningful for polygon shapes).

members.name: worldTransform
members.description: The collider's world transform (offset/rotation composed with the body's).

members.name: worldVertices
members.description: World-space polygon vertices [x0, y0, …] (only meaningful for polygon shapes).
